data.body: PASS-1 review (T10 Infrastructure/IaC). Strong on most dimensions (remote state+locking, plan-before-apply, least-privilege IAM, SSM secrets, prevent_destroy on the data volume, DLM snapshots + restore drill, alarms, sizing). ONE MAJOR finding on the endpoint access contract (b2): Gerrit's web UI/REST (443) and SSH (29418) are internet-reachable (SG cidr 0.0.0.0/0, public DNS), but Gerrit is configured with auth.type=DEVELOPMENT_BECOME_ANY_ACCOUNT (infra/compose/gerrit.config) — any human reaching the UI can become ANY account, including Administrator. The plan never commits a named human/admin auth mechanism for the Gerrit endpoint; the config comment itself defers it ("S3/S4a MAY refine... do NOT leave this on a box that holds anything sensitive"). See detailed finding.
